description: ACKO is an Indian digital insurance company offering products like car, bike, health, life, and travel insurance, along with enterprise insurance solutions for businesses. Its enterprise offering includes embedded insurance workflows such as policy issuance, retrieval, endorsements, and claims management.
summary: ACKO exposes a public MCP server at `https://atlas.live.acko.com/mcp` and an ACKO Enterprise HTTP API documented on its website; the Enterprise API’s authentication details and machine-readable spec were not publicly determinable from the accessible docs.
